heading: All about privacy
intro: This privacy policy applies to ezdev.solutions and explains how I use any personal information I collect about you when you use this website.

topics.title: What information I collect
topics.body: I collect information about you when you complete a form on my website. The information you give me may include your name, company name and email address.

topics.title: How I use the information
topics.body: I collect information to better understand how visitors use my website, to improve it, and to respond to you if you contact me through the site.

topics.title: Access & corrections
topics.body: You have the right to request a copy of the information I hold about you if you have contacted me before. Email me and I'll provide it.

topics.title: Cookies
topics.body: I may use cookies to give you the best experience and help improve the site. A cookie is a small file placed on your device when you visit a website — you can manage or delete cookies as you wish.

topics.title: Other websites
topics.body: My website may link to other websites. This privacy policy only applies to this website, so when you follow links elsewhere you should read their own policies.

topics.title: Changes to this policy
topics.body: I keep this privacy policy under regular review and will post any updates on this page.

topics.title: How to contact me
topics.body: Please get in touch if you have any questions about this privacy policy or the information I hold about you.

contact.label: CONTACT
contact.text: Questions about this policy or the information I hold about you? Email
